sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67202" key="meto/nuxon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετόνῠχον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n67202.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the last joint of the fingers,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.238</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
